/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/tests.dir/test/str.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/test/ldr.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/test/misc.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/cpu.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/emulator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/compiler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/registers.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/tests.dir/src/organised.cpp.o -o tests  /usr/lib/libCatch2WithMain.a
